# gtm_ops - Wranngle Proposal Console

> gtm_ops is Wranngle Systems' lead-to-proposal runtime. It accepts leads from web chat, voice-agent notes, contact forms, webhooks, or CRM exports, normalizes and enriches the fields, fills typed proposal fields with structured extraction, renders a branded PDF, and writes every step to a replayable run log. The console at app.wranngle.com is the hosted instance.

## Product

- [Product page](https://wranngle.com/products/gtm-ops): plans, pricing, and feature list
- [Source repository](https://github.com/wranngle/gtm_ops): runtime code, eval harness, and documentation

Pricing: Trial free for 14 days (5 proposals); Plus $20/mo (50 proposals/mo, branded PDFs, webhook integration); Pro $99/mo (unlimited proposals, SSO, team workspaces).

## Company

- [Wranngle Systems](https://wranngle.com): AI voice agents, workflow automation, and business websites
- [Company profile](https://wranngle.com/wranngle-systems.md): machine-readable company profile
- [Full LLM context](https://wranngle.com/llms-full.txt): canonical single-fetch context for Wranngle Systems and founder Cody Arnold

## Notes

- Marketing, pricing, and documentation live on wranngle.com; this subdomain serves the console itself.
- The `/api/` and `/fixtures/` paths are excluded from crawling via robots.txt.
